## Type of change

- [ ] Feature (`feat`)
- [ ] Bug fix (`fix`)
- [ ] Performance (`perf`)
- [ ] Refactor (`refactor`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs`)
- [ ] Tests (`test`)
- [ ] Build / dependency change (`build`)
- [ ] CI configuration (`ci`)
- [ ] Chore (`chore`)

## Pre-merge checklist

- [ ] Branch targets `develop` (or `main` for a hotfix).
- [ ] Commit messages follow [Conventional Commits](../docs/CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-messages--conventional-commits).
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes locally.
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change.
- [ ] A changeset was added (`pnpm changeset`) **if** a `packages/*` public API changed. Tooling, docs, app-only, and test-only changes do not need one.
- [ ] Public-facing changes update the relevant README / docs.
- [ ] If this introduces a breaking change, the changeset is `major` and the commit uses `!` or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer.
